political.s: Goods Unite Us A grade — corporate giving + executive donations heavily progressive. [goods-unite-us]
political.amt: $2.2 million (Save Our Home Planet Action contributions in 2024); $100,000+ annual political donations

charity.s: $100M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~6.67% of revenue) via Patagonia Inc. Certified B Corporation since 2022 (B Impact score 166/200).
charity.amt: $100+ million annually (post-2022 restructuring); $1-1.5% of annual sales historically
charity.focus: Environmental conservation, climate change mitigation, public lands protection, grassroots activism

environment.s: 1% for the Planet member — pledges 1% of annual sales to environmental nonprofits. Certified B Corporation since 2022 (B Impact score 166/200). Fair Trade Certified partner (apparel) — sources through cooperatives guaranteeing minimum prices and community premiums. Climate-commitment coalition member: We Mean Business Coalition (since 2018). We Mean Business Coalition member: committed to climate action across multiple WMBC campaigns. Ethical Consumer Best Buy — clothing guide leader on environment, supply-chain transparency, B Corp. DoneGood marketplace — featured for environmental + supply-chain commitments. [ethical-consumer · donegood · goodonyou]

labor.s: Certified B Corporation since 2022 (B Impact score 166/200). Fair Trade Certified partner (apparel) — sources through cooperatives guaranteeing minimum prices and community premiums.

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 95/100 (2025) — strong LGBTQ+ workplace policies with minor deductions. Certified B Corporation since 2022 (B Impact score 166/200). HRC Corporate Equality Index 95/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Regenerative Organic Certified Gold — apparel cotton + food line. [Regenerative Organic Certified (ROC Gold)]

privacy.s: Patagonia's published privacy notice discloses it 'sells' customer name, mailing address, and purchase history to marketing cooperative Epsilon, and its own policy states it maintains 'reasonable physical, electronic, and administrative measures' to safeguard data. However, as of 2024, Patagonia faced two active proposed class-action lawsuits: one filed July 11, 2024 in California Superior Court (Gills v. Patagonia) alleging it used AI vendor Talkdesk to intercept, record, and analyze customer phone calls without consent in violation of the California Invasion of Privacy Act, seeking $5,000 per violation per class member; and a second filed in Arizona federal court (Knight v. Patagonia, Case No. 4:24-cv-00255) alleging hidden email tracking pixels captured subscriber data without consent in violation of Arizona's Telephone, Utility and Communication Service Records Act, seeking $1,000 per violation.

citations.title: AI & Spy-Tracking Pixels Feature in Privacy Violation Lawsuits Against Patagonia – ASI Central
Patagonia invaded privacy by using AI to analyze customer service interactions, lawsuit alleges | The Record from Record

wiki.extract: Patagonia, Inc. is an American retailer of outdoor recreation clothing, equipment, and food. It was founded by Yvon Chouinard in 1973 and is based in Ventura, California. Patagonia operates stores in over ten countries, and factories in sixteen countries. It markets itself as a social justice focused brand. From 2007 to 2021, Patagonia has been found to use and benefit from factories that use human trafficking and forced labor, in violation of its own public standards.

sampleRecalls.title: Patagonia Recalls Patagonia Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets Due to Choking Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Patagonia Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets, sold in sizes 0 months through 24 months with style number 60910. Each set consists of a knitted polyester long sleeved bodysuit with snaps at the left shoulder and at the crotch, and a pair of matching knitted polyester pants with an elastic wa…
hazards: The snaps in the bodysuit of the recalled base layer sets can detach, posing a choking hazard if mouthed by infants.
injuries: Patagonia has received one report of a snap detaching from the shoulder of the bodysuit and being mouthed by a baby.
products: Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets
units: About 8,000 (In addition, about 217 were sold in Canada)
